title: Leetcode 1254. Number of Closed Islands
shortDescription: Count the number of 4-directionally connected components of 0s in a binary grid that are completely surrounded by 1s (i.e., the component does not touch the grid boundary). This is a flood-fill/DFS-BFS style problem on an up to 100x100 grid.

Leetcode 1254. Number of Closed Islands

Count the number of 4-directionally connected components of 0s in a binary grid that are completely surrounded by 1s (i.e., the component does not touch the grid boundary). This is a flood-fill/DFS-BFS style problem on an up to 100x100 grid.

Asked at:

Google
